flows.name: Flow_1_NewRequestNotification
flows.description: Triggered when a new row is inserted into TestRequests. Sends email to the assigned lab manager and the requester.

config.subject: [Lab] New Test Request @{triggerBody()?['RequestNumber']} – @{triggerBody()?['Priority']} Priority
config.body_html:
Hi @{body('Get_row_Engineers')?['FullName']},

Your test request @{triggerBody()?['RequestNumber']} for product @{body('Get_row_Products')?['ProductName']} has been received.

Priority: @{triggerBody()?['Priority']}
Due Date: @{triggerBody()?['DueDate']}

You will be notified as the status progresses.

flows.name: Flow_2_StatusChangeNotification
flows.description: Triggered when Status column changes in TestRequests. Notifies requester of the new status.

config.to: dynamic – requester email from Engineers table
config.subject: [Lab] Request @{triggerBody()?['RequestNumber']} is now @{triggerBody()?['Status']}
config.body_html: The status of your request @{triggerBody()?['RequestNumber']} has been updated to @{triggerBody()?['Status']}.

flows.name: Flow_3_OverdueReminder
flows.description: Scheduled flow — runs every weekday at 08:00. Queries usp_GetPendingNotifications and sends reminder emails.

config.subject: ⚠️ Overdue Test Request: @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestNumber']}
config.body_html:
Hi @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestedBy']},

Your test request @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestNumber']} was due on @{items('Apply_to_each')?['DueDate']} and is still open (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each')?['Status']}).

Please contact the lab team to follow up.

flows.name: Flow_4_ResultRecordedAlert
flows.description: Triggered when a new row is inserted into TestResults. Notifies requester when all tests for a request are complete.

config.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Remaining FROM RequestTests rt JOIN RequestTests rt2 ON rt2.RequestID = rt.RequestID WHERE rt.RequestTestID = @RequestTestID AND rt2.Status IN ('Pending','Running')

steps.action: [If yes] SQL Server – Execute stored procedure usp_UpdateRequestStatus

parameters.ChangeNote: All tests completed – auto-closed by Flow

config.subject: ✅ All Tests Complete – @{triggerBody()?['RequestNumber']}
config.body_html: All test results for request @{triggerBody()?['RequestNumber']} have been recorded. Please review the results in the Lab Testing Portal.
